title: inDecay: deep-learning prediction of CRISPR editing indel outcomes
description:
Code for inDecay, a deep-learning framework for predicting CRISPR editing indel outcomes, including the cross-species transfer-learning analyses in the manuscript.

Reproduction data and model weights are archived separately and pulled by scripts/fetch_data.py:

  • Training / somatic data — figshare DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.25133564.
  • Figure 4 & 5 fine-tuned checkpoints — Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20977675.
